failed_attempts.sql:
SELECT
  destination_profile_id AS profile_id,
  COUNT(origin_profile_id) AS num_followers
FROM profile_relationship
WHERE edge = 'follows'
GROUP BY destination_profile_id
ORDER BY num_followers DESC
LIMIT 10;

failed_attempts.sql:
SELECT
  origin_profile_id AS profile_id,
  COUNT(DISTINCT destination_profile_id) AS num_shared_followed_profiles
FROM profile_relationship
WHERE edge = 'follows'
GROUP BY origin_profile_id
ORDER BY num_shared_followed_profiles DESC
LIMIT 10;

failed_attempts.sql:
SELECT
  r1.destination_profile_id AS profile_id,
  COUNT(DISTINCT r1.origin_profile_id) AS shared_follower_count
FROM profile_relationship r1
JOIN profile_relationship r2 ON r1.origin_profile_id = r2.origin_profile_id
  AND r1.destination_profile_id != r2.destination_profile_id
WHERE r1.edge = 'follows'
  AND r2.edge = 'follows'
GROUP BY r1.destination_profile_id
ORDER BY shared_follower_count DESC
LIMIT 10;
